name: claudius
author: Claudius Network
description: Claude Code in the browser, now on your desktop

scripts.dev: node scripts/native-abi.mjs ensure node && next dev
scripts.test: node scripts/native-abi.mjs ensure node && vitest run
scripts.test:related: node scripts/native-abi.mjs ensure node && vitest related --run --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/native-abi.mjs ensure node && playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:electron: bun run electron:rebuild-native-for-node && bun run electron:compile && playwright test --project=chromium-electron
scripts.electron:dev: bun run electron:rebuild-native && bun run electron:compile && node scripts/electron-brand-dev.mjs && concurrently -k -n next,electron -c blue,magenta "bun run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 electron dist-electron/main.js"
scripts.electron:build: bun run electron:rebuild-native && node scripts/patch-next-generate-build-id.mjs && cross-env CLAUDIUS_PACKAGED=1 NODE_ENV=production next build && node scripts/electron-stage-standalone.mjs && bun run electron:compile
scripts.electron:app: bun run electron:build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder -m --dir
scripts.electron:dist:mac: bun run electron:build && electron-builder -m && node scripts/make-dmg.mjs
scripts.electron:dist:linux: bun run electron:build && electron-builder -l && node scripts/appimage-fuseless.mjs release
scripts.electron:rebuild-native: node scripts/electron-rebuild-native.mjs && node scripts/native-abi.mjs write electron
scripts.electron:rebuild-native-for-node: bun install --force better-sqlite3 && node scripts/native-abi.mjs write node
scripts.electron:smoke: bun run electron:rebuild-native-for-node && cross-env CLAUDIUS_PACKAGED=1 NODE_ENV=production next build && node scripts/electron-stage-standalone.mjs && bun run electron:compile && node dist-electron/smoke.js
